description: Public rate-card references for 12 m scissor lift rental in Germany. These are real, sourced market figures used ONLY as benchmarks and to ground simulated supplier policies. They prove the market spread exists; they prove nothing about this system.

references.notes: Day rate excl. VAT; second 12 m model listed at 125.00 EUR/day

references.item: SB 120-D diesel scissor lift, 11.75-11.96 m working height
references.notes: Plus 10% machine breakage insurance on net rent, plus transport by distance, plus 18.60 EUR service and return fee per unit

references.item: SB 120m-D megadeck diesel scissor lift, ~12 m working height
references.notes: Same fee structure as other BIBERGER units

references.item: SB 120b-E electric scissor lift, 11.75 m working height
references.notes: Electric drive; plus 10% insurance, transport, 18.60 EUR return fee

Based on 5-day rental; plus transport, provisioning, deposit where applicable; cleaning billed at 94.00 EUR/hour if required; fuel at day prices; overtime at 1/8 day rate per extra hour beyond 8h/weekday

typical_extras: delivery and pickup charged separately, distance-based
machine breakage / liability reduction ~10-12% of net rent or per-day fee
service or return fee per unit
